description:
Protect authenticated product routes and route patients to the correct onboarding step using Cognito identity plus DynamoDB app-status records.

**Scope**
- Middleware/server helpers enforce authenticated access for dashboard, account, billing, and onboarding routes.
- Store only step/status pointers in DynamoDB: consent status, intake submitted status, MDI patient/case IDs, and billing status.
- Redirect users who try to skip ahead to the earliest incomplete required step.
- Do not add KYC gates for launch. Persona/KYC remains out of scope unless a later decision reintroduces it.

**Acceptance**
- Unauthenticated users are redirected to sign in and return to the intended route after auth.
- Skip-ahead tests cover consents, intake submission, MDI handoff, and billing status.
- Route gating reads DynamoDB status records and never relies on questionnaire answers stored locally.
title: Protected routes + onboarding-step gates
